settings.heading: Fabric & Care
settings.content:
Wash separately in cold water to preserve fabric quality and colour.

Do not tumble dry; air dry in shade for best results. Always turn the garment inside-out to prevent fading.

Colour and print may gradually fade over time with repeated washes.

Each piece is handmade in small batches; slight variations and irregularities are a natural part of the garment’s uniqueness.

settings.heading: Silk
settings.text: This material is our signature high-stretch fabric that drapes like silk and is soft to the touch. Silk is OEKO-TEX certified and made in Italy in a mill 100% powered by renewable energy (solar and biomass).
settings.tags: Quick Dry, Chemical Free, Machine Washable
